title: [circt-verilog] Bug with SystemVerilog system call
body:
Hi all! Let's consider a simple `SystemVerilog` example:

```verilog
module reader ();

reg [31:0] myplus;

initial begin
   $value$plusargs("", myplus);
end

endmodule
```

When I try to build a `circt` core dialects representation `circt-verilog` produces no output to stdin:

```
circt-verilog test.sv
```

It's very odd behavior because similar example with another system call produces an "unsupported call" error:

```verilog
module reader ();

reg [31:0] myplus;

initial begin
   $test$plusargs("");
end

endmodule
```

error:

```
test.v:7:4: error: unsupported system call $test$plusargs
   $test$plusargs("");
```
